description: Restaurant promotion showcasing Ramadan iftar offerings with per-person pricing, location details, and photographer credit during the holy month.
structural_recipe: Post high-quality food photography of iftar spread or signature dishes. Include restaurant name in caption. State clear per-person pricing in SAR. Add location information (street/area). Credit the photographer with @handle. Use Arabic and English text. Timing: post during Ramadan season.
why_it_works: Ramadan creates peak F&B demand and cultural urgency to celebrate iftar with family. Per-person pricing transparency removes purchase friction. Location and photographer credits build trust and community engagement. Arabic-language messaging respects cultural authenticity.
transplantation_caveats: Timing critical: only effective during Ramadan month
Pricing must align with local market expectations
Must respect Islamic cultural sensitivities around meal timing and presentation
Iftar concept translates primarily to Muslim-majority markets
cultural_constraints: Content only relevant during Ramadan season
Pricing transparency expected in Saudi F&B market
Photographer credit reflects local community value
